title: CiReviewFinding
description: Normalized finding envelope all three reviewers map onto, so blind-hunter / edge-case-hunter / code-reviewer outputs are handled uniformly by the orchestrator.

filePath.description: Repository-root-relative path of the changed file the finding applies to.

line.description: 1-based line in the file's post-change content. Null for file-level findings.

ruleId.description: Optional identifier of the violated hard rule or check (e.g. 'hard-rule-3-uuidv7').
